Choose Your Faction

Your faction determines your unique skill branch

Quincy
A race of spiritual beings who inherited their power from the ancient Quincy King. They are able to absorb and manipulate reishi into different Spirit Weapons.
Shinigami
Shinigami are the guardians of common souls who go through transmigration. They purify Hollows who do evil, and ensure the safe passage of souls to the afterlife.
Hollow
Hollows are a race of animalistic creatures born from human souls. For whatever reason, they do not manage to cross over to the Soul Society after death.
